2604.24492.title: Deployment-Aligned Low-Precision Neural Architecture Search for Spaceborne Edge AI
2604.24492.paper_summary: Designing deep networks that meet strict latency and accuracy constraints on edge accelerators increasingly relies on hardware-aware optimization, including neural architecture search (NAS) guided by device-level metrics. Yet most hardware-aware NAS pipelines still optimize architectures under full-precision assumptions and apply low-precision adaptation only after the search, leading to a mismatch between optimization-time behavior and deployment-time execution on low-precision hardware that can substantially degrade accuracy. We address this limitation by integrating deployment-aligned low-precision training directly into hardware-aware NAS. Candidate architectures are exposed to FP16 numerical constraints during fine-tuning and evaluation, enabling joint optimization of architectural efficiency and numerical robustness without modifying the search space or evolutionary strategy. We evaluate the proposed framework on vessel segmentation for spaceborne maritime monitoring, targeting the Intel Movidius Myriad X Visual Processing Unit (VPU). While post-training precision conversion reduces on-device performance from 0.85 to 0.78 mIoU, deployment-aligned low-precision training achieves 0.826 mIoU on-device for the same architecture (95,791 parameters), recovering approximately two-thirds of deployment-induced accuracy gap without increasing model complexity. These results demonstrate that incorporating deployment-consistent numerical constraints into hardware-aware NAS substantially improves robustness and alignment between optimization and deployment for resource-constrained edge Artificial Intelligence (AI).
2604.24492.paper_summary_zh: 設計滿足邊緣加速器上嚴格延遲和準確性限制的深度網絡越來越依賴於硬體感知優化，包括由設備級指標指導的神經架構搜索（NAS）。然而，大多數硬體感知的 NAS 流程仍然在全精度假設下優化架構，並且僅在搜索之後應用低精度適應，導致優化時行為與在低精度硬體上的部署時執行之間的不匹配，這可能會顯著降低準確性。我們通過將與部署對齊的低精度訓練直接整合到硬體感知 NAS 中來解決這一限制。在微調和評估期間，候選架構暴露於 FP16 數值約束下，使得架構效率和數值穩健性可以共同優化，而無需修改搜索空間或進化策略。我們在針對 Intel Movidius Myriad X 視覺處理單元（VPU）的太空海洋監測的血管分割上評估了所提出的框架。雖然訓練後的精度轉換將設備上的性能從 0.85 降低到 0.78 mIoU，但與部署對齊的低精度訓練在相同架構（95,791 個參數）上實現了 0.826 mIoU，恢復了約三分之二的部署引起的準確性差距，而不增加模型複雜性。這些結果表明，將與部署一致的數值約束納入硬體感知 NAS 顯著提高了資源受限的邊緣人工智慧（AI）之間的穩健性和優化與部署的對齊。
2604.24492.author: Parampuneet Kaur Thind et.al.
2604.24492.authors: Parampuneet Kaur Thind, Vaibhav Katturu, Giacomo Zema, Roberto Del Prete
